description:
A powerful tool for managing networks and troubleshoot network problems!

Connect to remote systems and manage your network and server infrastructure using tools like Remote Desktop (RDP), PuTTY (SSH, Telnet, Serial), PowerShell (WinRM), TigerVNC (VNC), or AWS Console (AWS SSM). Analyze, troubleshoot, and obtain detailed information about your network and systems with features such as the WiFi Analyzer, IP Scanner, Port Scanner, Ping Monitor, Traceroute, DNS Lookup, and LLDP/CDP Capture (and many more) — all within a unified interface. Hosts and networks can be saved in encrypted profiles and used across all features.
🚀 New Features
- New tool Firewall added
  You can view / add / edit / delete / enable / disable entries
- Dashboard - Speedtest Widget added
- WiFi - Channel width (20, 40, 80 MHz, ...) added + 6 GHz channel view
- Neighbor Table supersedes ARP Table – supporting IPv6
- Remote Desktop - View only mode added
- DPI scaling for embedded PowerShell and PuTTY is now properly handled; fonts and controls now rescale correctly when moving between monitors with different DPI factors (e.g. 100% → 150%).
- Profiles - Import from Active Directory. Thanks to @Tyrix for the PR!
Here you can find the complete :page_facing_up: Changelog and the :book: Documentation.
